programmes.show_description: Graphic drama series set inside a women's prison. Bea uses Fletch to drive a wedge between Vera and Ferguson, setting a chain of events in motion.
This episode explores work/life balance. Noel decides to make a life-changing decision - stepping back from the bakery - leading Chloe and Luke to battle for the business.
Noel and Sue mark 30 happy years of marriage with a road trip visiting the church they got married in and the site of their first business, which nearly ended their marriage!
Locals bring their collectibles for valuation, but only the best items will go under the hammer. Will either auctioneer be tempted by a teak carving, or a pair of Victorian jelly moulds? (Ep28)
A daily round-up of showbiz news and gossip from around the world, focusing on celebrities, movies, music and entertainment.

Peter heads to Richard Todd's farm where a sheep's life is in danger. And at the Huddersfield hospital, Brandy the German Shepherd puppy is lame and in pain.
Animal behaviour experts Chirag and Nanci are called in to help Sue and her family. The battles between pup Bailey and Darcey the cat have raised stress levels to breaking point. (Ep 2)

programmes.show_name: Ben Fogle: New Lives in the Wild
programmes.show_description: Adventurer Ben Fogle visits 47-year-old 'sea gypsy' Rick, who meanders around French Polynesia on a tiny sailing boat.
In 1940, the Channel Islands comes under German occupation. Hitler becomes obsessed with keeping control of this small corner of Britain, ordering construction of fortified structures.
Jessica sets out to prove that the death of a young movie buff was murder - as was the supposed suicide of a Hollywood director 35 years ago.
The lover of a model who helped Jessica research a book is targeted by a killer in Paris, and Jessica is faced with a slave labour scandal.

programmes.show_name: Columbo and the Murder of a Rock Star
programmes.show_description: Detective mystery starring Peter Falk and Dabney Coleman. Columbo pits his wits against a sharp defence lawyer whom he suspects has murdered his rock-star girlfriend. (1991)
Bill Nighy takes us on a beautiful train journey to the tip of Cornwall. Starting in Devon, heading towards Penzance and joining two picturesque branch lines.
Strange structures rusting away at sea. Once cutting-edge in design and construction, they now lie disused, contaminated and dangerous. But who built them? And why were they abandoned?
In a bid to dominate the Pacific, Japan builds the Yamato: the biggest battleship in the world, with the most powerful guns and the thickest armour ever mounted on a warship.

programmes.show_name: Ben Fogle New Lives in the Wild
programmes.show_description: Ben journeys to the Pacific Northwest to live with former punk wild-child Lynx who lives, hunts, eats and sleeps in the wilderness.
Alex Polizzi rides to the rescue of the hospitality industry, in this new episode coming to the aid of a Somerset tearoom run by Mimmo and Michelle. Will Alex's plan answer their woes?

programmes.show_name: Inside the Four Seasons Park Lane
programmes.show_description: You are cordially invited to check in for a five-star stay at Four Seasons Hotel London as the iconic hotel throws open its doors to cameras for the very first time!
Budget holidaymakers and blingy big spenders go on their jollies together for the very first time. Will it be holiday heaven? Or holiday hell?
Graphic drama series set inside a women's prison in Melbourne. Ferguson loses control, and when she tries to cover her tracks, everyone is put in danger.
When Noel and Sue reflect on why they have such a big family, Noel decides to discover more about his birth parents, leading to discoveries with potentially life-changing consequences.
Return of the supersized family at mum Sue Radford's favourite season. But sibling rivalry has reached new heights, and it's up to Sue and husband Noel to broker a peace.
On valuation day, our auctioneer rivals compete for an English silver tea set, a cast iron planter and a 17th century barrel. But which items will bring in the bidders in the saleroom? (Ep29)

The townspeople in Cabot Cove are concerned about a massive land development project on the shore. Jessica's nephew Grady is among the first employed by the company.
A vicious battle takes place for the role of headmaster in a local prep school where Jessica is to give a lecture.
Detective drama starring Peter Falk and Fisher Stevens. A book about a famous film director is the sleuth's only clue to the death of a man found on Malibu Beach. (1989)
Share in train journeys that enliven the senses in this absorbing documentary series. The West Highland Line wends its way from Glasgow to the Isle of Skye.
An abandoned Italian dam hides five strange, deserted structures. Explore a lost escape route from nuclear Armageddon and a submerged link to D-Day.
Imperial Japan, desperate to stop the rampant US forces before they reach mainland Japan, build a network of defensive lines, bunkers and fortifications across the island of Okinawa.

programmes.show_name: Ben Fogle: New Lives in the Wild
programmes.show_description: Ben Fogle meets a husband and wife who gave up the city rat race to live as safari guides in an unexplored Tanzanian national park.
James rewrites stories of the greatest explorers in his inimitable entertaining way, starting with Columbus - and how he merely 'stumbled across' two continents, then took the spoils. (Ep1/3)
It's captivated us for over 2000 years, but did it really exist? In Greece, Dan finds out if there is any truth in the tale of a lost city that disappeared beneath the waves.
